testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 200.................................passed And Response should contain a valid authentication token....................passed And Token should not be empty...............................................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "wrongpassword".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 2
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "invaliduser" and password "password".passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 3
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "" and password "password"....passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 4
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "".......passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed

testcase.classname: Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API
testcase.name: User authentication with invalid credentials 5
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user with username "" and password ""............passed Then API response status code should be 401.................................passed And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials"..........................passed And Response should not contain authentication token........................passed
